meta.title: Kishen NL – Senior Product Designer Portfolio
meta.description: Portfolio of Kishen NL, Senior Product Designer specializing in analytics-heavy SaaS, data visualization, and system-level UX.

hero.name: Kishen
hero.heading: I'm Kishen, a Senior Product Designer based in Bengaluru.
hero.bio: Over the past 6+ years as a Product Designer, I've worked on turning complex problems into clear and usable experiences. I enjoy building products that bring clarity to data and help teams make better decisions.

projects.title: Profit Recovery Automation
projects.description: Designed to turn scattered recovery work into revenue by making the recovery journey visible, trustworthy, and stakeholder-ready.

projects.title: Market Share
projects.description: Helped build the measurement foundation teams relied on weekly, then guided the v2 diagnostics expansion without breaking the core mental model.

paragraphs: I'm a designer whose path into this field was anything but linear. My early years at Amazon gave me a solid grounding in the mechanics of e-commerce, but also revealed what was missing: a way to approach challenges through design and create meaningful results. That realization prompted my shift into design, where I have spent the last 6 years shaping SaaS products, leading initiatives such as Profit Recovery Automation and Market Share, while also mentoring designers who have grown into independent roles.

What I value most is measurable impact, whether it is a visualization that enables an executive to make faster decisions or a workflow that saves hours for a team. Outside of work, I find inspiration in photography and traveling.

testimonials.name: Amarsh Vutukuri
testimonials.text: "From the beginning, Kishen played a critical role in building products and design systems from the ground up. His ability to think at a systems level while maintaining an eye for detail has been truly impressive."

testimonials.name: Siddharth Shankar
testimonials.text: "Kishen has a rare ability to balance user needs with business goals, ensuring that every decision is rooted in both empathy and strategy."

testimonials.name: Shubham Maurya
testimonials.text: "He has a very sharp sense on how to translate business workflows into intuitive user experiences. His designs consistently improve key metrics."

testimonials.name: Srujay Gautam
testimonials.text: "Kishen played a pivotal role in designing and scaling CommerceIQ's Profit Recovery Automation (PRA). His strategic thinking elevated the entire product."

testimonials.name: Rajath Raman
testimonials.text: "Kishen has an acute sense of attention to detail, which enables him to produce designs that are both elegant and highly functional."

testimonials.name: Ayush Kumar Kejriwal
testimonials.text: "His ability to break down complex problems, think strategically, and execute with precision is truly remarkable."

testimonials.name: Bhavya Sinha
testimonials.text: "I had the privilege of working with Kishen during my early years as a product designer, and his mentorship was invaluable to my growth."
